name: Alabama Dietitian License
description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to Alabama - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: Alabama Board of Examiners for Dietetics/Nutrition Practice

requiredDocuments.name: CDR Registration Verification
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of active registration with the Commission on Dietetic Registration.

requiredDocuments.name: Driver's License or Government ID
requiredDocuments.description: Verification of identity and legal presence in the U.S.

requiredDocuments.name: Official Transcripts
requiredDocuments.description: Sent directly from the university showing your conferred degree.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does an Alabama dietitian license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The initial cost is $250, which includes a non-refundable $100 application fee and a $150 license fee. The temporary license costs $175.

mainEntity.name: When does the Alabama license need to be renewed?

acceptedAnswer.text: The license is renewed biennially (every two years). The renewal fee is $200.

mainEntity.name: What are the continuing education requirements?

acceptedAnswer.text: Alabama requires 30 hours of continuing professional education (CPE) during each two-year renewal cycle.

mainEntity.name: Does Alabama have reciprocity for dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: No interstate compact currently covers dietitian practice in Alabama. To work in Alabama, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to Alabama?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Alabama while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
